segments.text: ANGELA: Hello, Flanders conference hotel.
segments.translation: 安吉拉：你好，这里是法兰德斯会议酒店。

segments.text: MAN: Oh, hi. I wanted to ask about conference facilities at the hotel.
segments.translation: 男士：哦，你好。我想咨询一下酒店的会议设施。

segments.text: Have I come through to the right person?
segments.translation: 我问对人了吗？

segments.text: ANGELA: You have. I'm the customer services manager.
segments.translation: 安吉拉：你问对人了。我是客服经理。

segments.text: My name's Angela.
segments.translation: 我叫安吉拉。

segments.text: So how can I help you?
segments.translation: 请问可以帮你些什么？

segments.text: MAN: Well, I'm calling from Barrett and Stansons, we're a medical company based in Perth.
segments.translation: 男子：嗯，我来自巴雷特和斯坦森公司，我们是一家位于珀斯的医疗公司。

segments.text: ANGELA: Oh yes.
segments.translation: 安吉拉：嗯，好的。

segments.text: MAN: And we're organising a conference for our clients to be held in Sydney.
segments.translation: 男士：我们想要在悉尼举行一场客户会议。

segments.text: It'll be held over two days and we're expecting about fifty or sixty people.
segments.translation: 会议将持续两天，我们大约有五六十人参会。

segments.text: ANGELA: When were you thinking of having it?
segments.translation: 安吉拉：你们想什么时候举行这场会议？

segments.text: MAN: Some time early next year, like the end of January?
segments.translation: 男士：明年初的某个时候，比如一月底？

segments.text: It'd have to be a weekend.
segments.translation: 会议得在周末举行。

segments.text: ANGELA: Let me see ... our conference facilities are already booked for the weekend beginning January 28th.
segments.translation: 安吉拉：让我看看……1月28日开始的那个周末我们的会议设施已经被预订了。

segments.text: We could do the first weekend in February?
segments.translation: 可以给您预定二月份的第一个周末吗？

segments.text: MAN: How about January 21st?
segments.translation: 男士：1月21日可以吗？

segments.text: ANGELA: I'm afraid that's booked too.
segments.translation: 安吉拉：抱歉，恐怕那时候也被预定了。

segments.text: MAN: Well, let's go for the February date then.
segments.translation: 男士：好吧，那我们再看看二月的日期。

segments.text: ANGELA: So that's the weekend beginning the 4th.
segments.translation: 安吉拉：所以那是2月4日开始的周末了。

segments.text: MAN: OK. Now can you tell me a bit about what conference facilities you have?
segments.translation: 男士：好的。您能说说你们有什么会议设施吗？

segments.text: ANGELA: Sure. So for talks and presentations we have the Tesla room.
segments.translation: 安吉拉：好的。我们的特斯拉房间用于会谈和演示。

segments.text: MAN: Sorry?
segments.translation: 男士：抱歉，那是什么？

segments.text: ANGELA: Tesla - that's spelled T-E-S-L-A.
segments.translation: 安吉拉:特斯拉——拼写为T-E-S-L-A。

segments.text: It holds up to a hundred people, and it's fully equipped with a projector and so on.
segments.translation: 它可容纳一百人，配备齐全，有投影仪等设备。

segments.text: MAN: How about a microphone?
segments.translation: 男士：麦克风呢？

segments.text: ANGELA: Yes, that'll be all set up ready for you, and there'll be one that members of the audience can use too, for questions, if necessary.
segments.translation: 安吉拉：有的，这些都将为您准备好，而且如有必要，观众也可以使用一支单独的麦克风来提问。

segments.text: MAN: Fine. And we'll also need some sort of open area where people can sit and have a cup of coffee, and we'd like to have an exhibition of our products and services there as well, so that'll need to be quite a big space.
segments.translation: 男：好的。而且我们还需要一些开放区域，人们可以坐下来喝杯咖啡，我们也希望在那里展示我们的产品和服务，所以这需要相当大的空间。

segments.text: ANGELA: That's fine, there's a central atrium with all those facilities, and you can come before the conference starts if you want to set everything up.
segments.translation: 安吉拉：可以的，我们有一个中庭，设有所有这些设施，如果你们想要把这些都布置好，可以在会议开始前就过来。

segments.text: MAN: Great. And I presume there's wifi?
segments.translation: 男子：很好。我猜那里应该有WiFi吧？

segments.text: ANGELA: Oh, yes, that's free and available throughout the hotel.
segments.translation: 安吉拉：哦，有的，在整个酒店都可以免费使用。

segments.text: MAN: OK.
segments.translation: 男士：好的。

segments.text: ANGELA: Would you also like us to provide a buffet lunch?
segments.translation: 安吉拉：您还希望我们提供自助午餐吗？

segments.text: We can do a two-course meal with a number of different options.
segments.translation: 我们可以提供包含两道菜的正餐，还有很多不同的选择。

segments.text: MAN: What sort of price are we looking at for that?
segments.translation: 男士：那样的话价格是怎样呢？

segments.text: ANGELA: Well, I can send you a copy of the standard menu.
segments.translation: 安吉拉：嗯，我可以寄给您一份标准菜单。

segments.text: That's $45 per person.
segments.translation: 费用是每人45美元。

segments.text: Or you can have the special for $25 more.
segments.translation: 或者您还可以选择特别菜单，每人多加25美元。

segments.text: MAN: I think the standard should be ok, but yes, send me the menu.
segments.translation: 男士：我认为标准菜单应该就可以了，但还是给我发一份菜单吧。

segments.text: MAN: Now we're also going to need accommodation on the Saturday night for some of the participants ...
segments.translation: 男士：我们还需要在星期六晚上为一些参与者提供住宿……

segments.text: I'm not sure how many, but probably about 25.
segments.translation: 我不确定有多少，但可能大约25人。

segments.text: So what do you charge for a room?
segments.translation: 你们一个房间收费多少？

segments.text: ANGELA: Well, for conference attendees we have a 25% reduction, so we can offer you rooms at $135.
segments.translation: 安吉拉：嗯，对于参会者我们有25％的优惠，所以我们可以为您提供收费135美元的房间。

segments.text: Normally a standard room's $180.
segments.translation: 通常一个标间为180美元。

segments.text: MAN: And does that include breakfast?
segments.translation: 男士：包含早餐吗？

segments.text: ANGELA: Sure. And of course, guests can also make use of all the other facilities at the hotel.
segments.translation: 安吉拉：当然包含。此外，客人还可以使用酒店的所有其他设施。

segments.text: So we've got a spa where you can get massages and facials and so on, and there's a pool up on the roof for the use of guests.
segments.translation: 我们有一个水疗中心，您可以享受按摩和面部护理等等，屋顶上有一个游泳池供客人使用。

segments.text: MAN: Great. Now what about transport links?
segments.translation: 男士：太好了。现在来说说交通？

segments.text: The hotel's downtown, isn't it?
segments.translation: 酒店在市中心，对吧？

segments.text: ANGELA: Yes, it's about 12 kilometres from the airport, but there's a complimentary shuttle bus for guests.
segments.translation: 安吉拉：是的，酒店离机场大约12公里，但是有为客人提供的免费的往返巴士。

segments.text: And it's only about ten minutes' walk from the central railway station.
segments.translation: 从酒店步行到中央火车站仅约10分钟。

segments.text: MAN: OK. Now, I don't know Sydney very well, can you just give me an idea of the location of the hotel?
segments.translation: 男士：好的。我对悉尼不太熟，你能告诉我一下酒店的位置吗？

segments.text: ANGELA: Well, it's downtown on Wilby Street, that's quite a small street, and it's not very far from the sea.
segments.translation: 安吉拉：嗯。酒店位于威尔比街的市中心，这是一条很小的街道，距离大海不远。

segments.text: And of course if the conference attendees want to go out on the Saturday evening there's a huge choice of places to eat.
segments.translation: 当然，如果参会者想要在周六晚上出去，也有很多吃饭的地方可供选择。

segments.text: Then if they want to make a night of it, they can go on to one of the clubs in the area - there are a great many to choose from.
segments.translation: 然后，如果他们想痛快地玩儿一晚上，他们可以去俱乐部，这儿有很多俱乐部可供选择。

segments.text: MAN: OK. So if we go ahead with this, can you give me some information about how much …
segments.translation: 男士：好的。那我们接着谈谈。你能告诉我……
